scripts.tauri:probe:clear: node scripts/tauri-preflight.mjs && env VITE_TRANSPARENCY_PROBE=clear node scripts/run-tauri.mjs dev
scripts.tauri:probe:panel: node scripts/tauri-preflight.mjs && env VITE_TRANSPARENCY_PROBE=panel node scripts/run-tauri.mjs dev
scripts.tauri:probe:solid: node scripts/tauri-preflight.mjs && env VITE_TRANSPARENCY_PROBE=solid node scripts/run-tauri.mjs dev
